roa.docketEntryComment: Order for Property Release Pursuant to Stipulation
Motion-REQUEST FOR PROPERTY RELEASE ORDER PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
Case Dismissed PC 1385 - Release to Other Agency
Advisement and Waiver - Arraignment on Governor's Warrant and Fugitive Admits Identity

/CAL: STATUS OF GOVERNOR'S WARRANT/X:GOVERNOR'S WARRANT STILL PENDING,/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL REQUEST TO EXTEND COMMITMENT TIME 60 DAYS PURSUANT TO PC 1552 IS GRANTED,/CONT/

/CAL:STATUS OF ID & RECONSIDERATION OF WAIVER OF EXTRADITION/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S #1 - SINGLE DOCUMENT FROMVOLUSIA COUNTY WARRANT #2022232724, FELONY WARRANT FROM THE STATE OF FLORIDA; PEOPLE'S #2 - 3 PAGE DOCUMENT LABELED S,F,P,D, MUGSHOT PROFILE; PEOPLE'S #3 - 3 PAGE DOCUMENT LABELED S,F,P,D, CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD/X:COURT STATES THAT PEOPLE HAVE PROVEN THAT PAROLEE IS THE PERSON BEING SOUGHT BY INFLORIDA/X:COURT DOES FIND PROBABLE CAUSE THAT THIS INDIVIDUAL'S I,D, IN THE EXHIBITS PRODUCED IS MR, PIRA/X:PAROLEE'S ID HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED/CONTD:STATUS OF GOVERNOR'S WARRANT/DOP/

/CAL: FUGITIVE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/PD/X:SFPD FUGITIVE SGT, JOHN CONWAY APPEARING/X: DEFENDANT NOT ARRAIGNED ON FUGITIVE WARRANT, DOES NOT ADMIT ID ANDDOESNOT WAIVE EXTRADITION/   /CONTD: STATUS OF ID AND RECONSIDERATION OF WAIVER OF EXTRADITION/
